center.name: 維爾卡潘帕山脈
center.summary: 維爾卡潘帕山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Fulvous wren，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fitzpatricki is found in the Vilcabamba mountain range, which is also in Cuzco

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: fitzpatricki is found in the Vilcabamba mountain range, which is also in Cuzco
